description:
Collect inventory data and metrics of your hosts and sends it to the New Relic platform.


What's Changed
- fix: panic due to double close in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2270
- fix: bind local server to only localhost by default in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2271
- chore(deps): update dependency newrelic/nri-flex to v1.18.7 in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2273
- chore(deps): update dependency newrelic/nri-winservices to v1.5.3 in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2279
- chore(deps): update dependency newrelic/nri-prometheus to v2.29.4 in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2276
- chore(deps): update dependency newrelic/nri-docker to v2.8.1 in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2277
- chore(deps): update dependency newrelic/nri-flex to v1.18.8 in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2278
- chore(deps): bump Go to 1.26.5 in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2275
- chore(deps): bump newrelic-fluent-bit-output to 3.7.0 (linux) in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2280 to address CVE-2026-39820, CVE-2026-42499, CVE-2026-33814, CVE-2026-42501, CVE-2026-33811, CVE-2026-42504
